# Pull Request

## What does this change?

<!-- Brief description of what you've added, changed, or fixed -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Data update (card text, cost, rarity correction)
- [ ] New card or relic added
- [ ] New synergy edge added
- [ ] Bug fix (application code)
- [ ] New feature (application code)
- [ ] New layout variant
- [ ] Documentation

## Data changes checklist

If this PR includes data changes:

- [ ] Card text verified against current StS2 EA version
- [ ] Source noted (sts2.untapped.gg, in-game screenshot, patch notes)
- [ ] Edge descriptions explain *why* the connection exists, not just *that* it does
- [ ] Patch version noted in CHANGELOG.md if applicable
- [ ] `image_url` added for new card nodes (or left empty if not yet available)
- [ ] `wiki_url` added for new card nodes

## Layout changes checklist

If this PR introduces a new layout variant:

- [ ] Branched from `main` as `layout/{name}`
- [ ] Layout hypothesis stated — what learning problem does it solve?
- [ ] Screenshot included below
- [ ] Added to Layout Variants table in README.md

## Screenshot (if applicable)
